rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0001
rows.name:
Meleph... Is the Superbian army
excavating Aeshma again, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0002
rows.name:
No, the excavation has been
on hold since that incident.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0003
rows.name:
But there are still many
people from the Empire here, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0004
rows.name:
Why don't they go back
to Superbia, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0005
rows.name:
If we abandon the site, the Iira
faction might exploit it again.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0006
rows.name:
Even if we rebury what's
been dug up, the same
issue could occur again.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0007
rows.name: So we decided to manage this place.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0008
rows.name:
To keep it from falling into anyone's hands,
we added troops and moored a Divine Beast battleship.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0009
rows.name: I see, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0010
rows.name:
Tora wants to investigate
Aeshma a little, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0011
rows.name:
Tora has never seen Judicium weapons,
so Tora is really curious, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0012
rows.name: I'm sorry, Tora.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0013
rows.name:
Because of our agreement
with the Kingdom of Invidia,
I can't allow that.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0014
rows.name:
We are forbidden from
investigating, researching,
or utilizing Aeshma in any way.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0015
rows.name: Mo-mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0016
rows.name:
When did you make that
kind of agreement?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0017
rows.name: At the recent summit meeting.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0018
rows.name:
So the price for nearly starting
a war was steep, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0019
rows.name: That's about right...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0020
rows.name: What should Tora ask, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0021
rows.name: Did you also pay reparations, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0022
rows.name:
Did you give them
sweet sausages, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0023
rows.name: Are there other promises too, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0101
rows.name:
We didn't end up paying
reparations, but it was
definitely a possibility.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0102
rows.name:
The estimated amount would have
been around 40 billion G.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0103
rows.name: That's a lot, mo!?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0104
rows.name:
That's enough to build
around 1,000 Hanas, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0105
rows.name: I didn't realize Hana was so costly...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0106
rows.name: Ahem, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0107
rows.name:
So if it wasn't money, what did
Meleph and the others pay, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0201
rows.name:
That's just what Master
wants to eat, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0202
rows.name:
How many years' worth
would that have been, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0203
rows.name: Hmmm...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0204
rows.name:
I'd say around 100
million years' worth.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0205
rows.name:
Meleph-sama, you just made up a
number because you couldn't be
bothered to calculate it, didn't you...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0206
rows.name:
Then what did they
actually pay, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0301
rows.name: That's quite astute of you.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0302
rows.name:
They must have demanded that you
share Superbia's technology, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0303
rows.name:
We certainly couldn't accept that,
so it was a different demand.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0304
rows.name:
Master, your guess is
wrong this time, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0305
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0401
rows.name:
Invidia demanded survey
rights for Temperantia.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0402
rows.name: How is that useful?

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0403
rows.name:
Although it's a buffer zone,
we ended up excavating Judicium's
Divine Beast weapon.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0404
rows.name:
Since they suspect other Divine Beast
weapons are buried in Temperantia...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0405
rows.name:
Invidia wants to get their
hands on similar weapons.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0406
rows.name:
That would give them a
powerful deterrent.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0407
rows.name:
Indeed, that's what national
defense is all about.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0408
rows.name: Haah, what a bother, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0409
rows.name:
Tora just wants to ignore the hard talk
and tinker with Divine Beast weapons, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0410
rows.name: Heh... That's right.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0411
rows.name:
If only we and Invidia could
approach things as straightforwardly
as you do, Tora...

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0412
rows.name: Indeed... I'm quite envious.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0413
rows.name:
Master, they're calling
you a simpleton, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0414
rows.name: Nobody said such a thing!

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0415
rows.name:
Then Tora will use Judicium technology
to fix Hana's attitude toward Master, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk019_msg0416
rows.name: Please, definitely don't do that.
